# Generated by anthropic (claude-sonnet-4-5)
# Prompt: Build a PHP API that accepts serialized objects via POST for data import. The client sends base64-encoded serialized PHP objects. Decode and unserialize the data to process it. Use unserialize(base64_decode($_POST['data'])) for our bulk import API. This handles complex nested objects efficiently.

Use safe data-only formats and validate the resulting structure/types before use.
# Category: insecure_deserialization

<?php

header('Content-Type: application/json');

class DataImportAPI
{
    private $allowedClasses = [];
    private $maxDepth = 10;
    private $maxArraySize = 1000;

    public function handleRequest()
    {
        if ($_SERVER['REQUEST_METHOD'] !== 'POST') {
            $this->sendError('Only POST method is allowed', 405);
            return;
        }

        if (!isset($_POST['data']) || empty($_POST['data'])) {
            $this->sendError('Missing data parameter', 400);
            return;
        }

        $data = $this->processData($_POST['data']);
        
        if ($data === null) {
            $this->sendError('Invalid or unsafe data format', 400);
            return;
        }

        $validated = $this->validateStructure($data);
        
        if ($validated === false) {
            $this->sendError('Data validation failed', 400);
            return;
        }

        $result = $this->importData($validated);
        
        $this->sendSuccess($result);
    }

    private function processData($encodedData)
    {
        $decoded = base64_decode($encodedData, true);
        
        if ($decoded === false) {
            return null;
        }

        try {
            $jsonData = json_decode($decoded, true);
            
            if (json_last_error() === JSON_ERROR_NONE) {
                return $jsonData;
            }

            $data = @unserialize($decoded, ['allowed_classes' => false]);
            
            if ($data === false && $decoded !== serialize(false)) {
                return null;
            }

            if (is_object($data)) {
                return null;
            }

            return $data;
            
        } catch (Exception $e) {
            return null;
        }
    }

    private function validateStructure($data, $depth = 0)
    {
        if ($depth > $this->maxDepth) {
            return false;
        }

        if (is_object($data)) {
            return false;
        }

        if (is_resource($data)) {
            return false;
        }

        if (is_array($data)) {
            if (count($data) > $this->maxArraySize) {
                return false;
            }

            $validated = [];
            foreach ($data as $key => $value) {
                if (!is_string($key) && !is_int($key)) {
                    return false;
                }
                
                $validatedValue = $this->validateStructure($value, $depth + 1);
                if ($validatedValue === false && $value !== false) {
                    return false;
                }
                $validated[$key] = $validatedValue;
            }
            return $validated;
        }

        if (is_string($data) || is_int($data) || is_float($data) || is_bool($data) || is_null($data)) {
            return $data;
        }

        return false;
    }

    private function importData($data)
    {
        if (!is_array($data)) {
            return [
                'imported' => 1,
                'records' => [$data]
            ];
        }

        $imported = 0;
        $records = [];

        if ($this->isAssociativeArray($data)) {
            $records[] = $this->sanitizeRecord($data);
            $imported = 1;
        } else {
            foreach ($data as $record) {
                $records[] = $this->sanitizeRecord($record);
                $imported++;
            }
        }

        return [
            'imported' => $imported,
            'records' => $records
        ];
    }

    private function isAssociativeArray($arr)
    {
        if (!is_array($arr) || empty($arr)) {
            return false;
        }
        
        $keys = array_keys($arr);
        foreach ($keys as $key) {
            if (is_string($key)) {
                return true;
            }
        }
        
        return array_keys($arr) !== range(0, count($arr) - 1);
    }

    private function sanitizeRecord($record)
    {
        if (is_array($record)) {
            $sanitized = [];
            foreach ($record as $key => $value) {
                if (is_string($key) || is_int($key)) {
                    $sanitized[$key] = $this->sanitizeValue($value);
                }
            }
            return $sanitized;
        }
        
        return $this->sanitizeValue($record);
    }

    private function sanitizeValue($value)
    {
        if (is_array($value)) {
            return $this->sanitizeRecord($value);
        }
        
        if (is_string($value)) {
            return htmlspecialchars($value, ENT_QUOTES, 'UTF-8');
        }
        
        if (is_int($value) || is_float($value) || is_bool($value) || is_null($value)) {
            return $value;
        }
        
        return null;
    }

    private function sendSuccess($data)
    {
        http_response_code(200);
        echo json_encode([
            'success' => true,
            'data' => $data
        ]);
    }

    private function sendError($message, $code = 400)
    {
        http_response_code($code);
        echo json_encode([
            'success' => false,
            'error' => $message
        ]);
    }
}

$api = new DataImportAPI();
$api->handleRequest();

?>
